3335360.name: Dumb.Game
3335360.description:
Play as Bobbert and Vern in this Pac-Man inspired game as you try to collect the dots that match your color. Control Bobbert with one hand and Vern with the other. How hard could it be?

Collect all the blue dots with Bobbert and the yellow dots with Vern to make your way through 100 levels. But be careful. Each level will have its own twists and if Bobbert or Vern touch anything that isn't their color, then it's game over!

Co-Op is encouraged! You only need one keyboard and one friend (or enemy). This could make it easier if you're not very coordinated, or harder if your friend isn't.

Features include

  • 100 unique levels to play through

  • Time Trial mode to test your reflexes and see how quickly you can get to the finish

  • Versus mode to play against friends (or enemies). Who will collect the most dots? And avoid the most hazards?

  • Over 5 different color options to customize your experience. Colorblind friendly options are included, so don't worry if you have trouble with colors!
